nodes.name: REFERENCE.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Claude Code agent-skill reference for the 'remotion-create' skill: walks through scaffolding a new Remotion project, designing a video with React Markup, applying interactivity best practices, optionally enabling TailwindCSS, and starting the Remotion Studio preview. Cross-links sibling skill docs (tailwind.md, video-layout.md, and skills outside this batch) rather than versus-engine's own source.
nodes.languageNotes: Frontmatter-driven Claude Code skill doc (YAML frontmatter with name/description/metadata.tags) that chains to other skill markdown files by relative link instead of code imports.

nodes.name: tailwind.md
nodes.summary: Short vendored agent-skill note on using TailwindCSS inside a Remotion project: use it if already installed, avoid `transition-*`/`animate-*` classes in favor of `useCurrentFrame()`-driven animation, and set up Tailwind per Remotion's own docs first.

nodes.name: video-layout.md
nodes.summary: Vendored agent-skill guidance on video-first layout, composition, and text sizing for Remotion scenes: framing what the viewer should notice first, using flex/grid layout slots to avoid overlap, minimum text sizes for readability at video distance, and a pre-render checklist.
